author: SantiMod
content:
We have completed the burn on all remaining posters! We did move some assets into two separate distribution wallets which are in place to cover ~40 team distributions, and 4 complete sets of posters.

The balances you see remaining are there so we can process the conversion/swap from ETH-based posters sold on OpenSea, over to Solana.
